Privacy PolicyLOGICORD LLCPRIVACY POLICYLast Updated: October12, 2018At Logicord LLC , we are committed to maintainingprivacy protections for our users.  This Privacy Policy describes what
information we collect when you use our web site, mobile apps, and onlineservices (collectively, the "Services").1.INFORMATION WE COLLECTA.

decoder_heading: Information You Provide to Us Directly
ident_heading: Information You Provide to Us Directly
heading_content_part: Information You Provide to Us DirectlyWe collect information that you provide to us whencontacting us through the Services or via e-mail. We also collect informationthat you submit through the Services, such as breaking news reports.B.

decoder_heading: Other Information We Collect When You Use Our Services
ident_heading: Other Information We Collect When You Use Our Services
heading_content_part: Other Information We Collect When You Use Our ServicesWe collect other information automatically when you use the Services,including:IP addressHardware or device identifiers, including Advertising     IDBrowser details, including your browser type and     versionDevice or hardware details, such as device type and     operating systemEvent logs, including crash reportsAnalytics data about your use of our Services (e.g.     session length, pages and content accessed, errors encountered)

decoder_heading: Other Information We Collect When You Use Our Services
ident_heading: Other Information We Collect When You Use Our Services
heading_content_part: Mobile device data, such as push notification tokens     or GPS location, to enable optional features with your consentWe also may collect and store information locally on your device usingcookies or similar tracking technology.C.

decoder_heading: Information Provided to Us by Third Parties
ident_heading: Information Provided to Us by Third Parties
heading_content_part: Information Provided to Us by Third PartiesIf you load any of our Services from a third party appstore or mobile platform provider, we may receive information from that thirdparty including your username, device ID, and a description of the purchase thatdoes not include sensitive financial information.We may receive information from third parties, such as Facebook orGame Center, when you use these features in our Services. We may also receive

decoder_heading: Information Provided to Us by Third Parties
ident_heading: Information Provided to Us by Third Parties
heading_content_part: information about you when other players choose to share their contact listswith us.We may also receive information from our advertising partners,such as if you were directed to our Services from an ad campaign.2.
HOW INFORMATION IS COLLECTEDIn addition to information that you provide to usdirectly, such as via e-mail or through forms in our Services, we also usecertain technologies to collect information.A.

Cookies and Tracking TechnologiesWe may use cookies, web beacons, tracking pixels,and other tracking technologies in the Services to help customize the Servicesand improve your experience.Cookies are small text files stored by yourInternet browser. You can use your browser settings to restrict or disablecookies.B.

Analytics TechnologiesWe use our own servers and third party technologies tocollect information about how you use our Services and how our Services areoperating on your computer or device, including details about performance anderrors.Our servers collect data for specific events, such asin-app purchases or breaking news reports. This data may include hardware ordevice identifiers but does not include sensitive billing information. If you

participate in social features, such as submitting breaking news reports, thedata collected may be shown to other users of the app in connection with thesesocial features.Third party analytics services, such as Flurry andCrashlytics, are integrated into our Services to collect usage and errorinformation. This data is typically used in aggregate to help us understand howusers are using our Services and monitor the health of our Services. These

third party services may combine information collected from our Services withinformation they have independently collected over time across different appsand websites. These third party services may allow you to opt out of some orall data collection independently of our Services.C.

Advertising NetworksWe use advertising in some of our Services to generaterevenue while making these Services available to you for free or at a reducedcost. We show advertisements provided by third party ad networks in some of ourServices, and we may also use ad networks to advertise our Services via thirdparties.Our Services integrates with ad serving technologiesthat may use cookies, web beacons, and other tracking technologies topersonalize and deliver ads to you. These technologies collect and use

information to serve advertising and track results such as the effectiveness ofan advertising campaign.Information collected by ad serving technologiesincludes:Device or hardware identifiers, such as Advertising IDWhich ad was served, where it appeared, and for how longit was visibleDetails about the ad request, including IP addressDetails about the ad response, including status or errorcodesThird party ad networks may combine information

collected from our Services with information they have independently collectedover time across different apps and websites. This information may be used tomeasure the effectiveness of ads and provide personalized, targeted ads thatmay be of interest to you.You can opt out of interest-based advertising on mobileapplications by changing the privacy settings of your device. For Apple iOS,enable the "limit ad tracking" option. For Android, select the "optout of interest-based ads" or similar option.3.

USE OF YOUR INFORMATIONWe use your information for the purposes of operating, supporting,improving, and personalizing our Services, including:To enable online features and updatesTo enable social features, such as breaking news     reportsTo communicate with you, such as responding to     customer support inquiries by e-mailTo comply with our legal obligations, and to enforce     our agreements and policiesTo monitor the health of our Services, including any     errors that occur

To understand usage patterns and behavior that can     help us enhance your experience using our ServicesTo detect and prevent fraudulent activityTo remember your preferences and deliver relevant     contentTo serve relevant advertisements and provide targeted     offers, rewards, or discounts4.

SHARING OF INFORMATIONWe may share your personal information with thirdparties for the purposes described in this Privacy Policy.We may share your information with third party serviceproviders, including ad networks and data processing services for analytics anderror reporting. We may also share your information with third parties thatmanage social features (such as game stats or leaderboards) and for other usesdescribed in this Privacy Policy.We may share your information with law enforcement

agencies or other third parties if we believe disclosure is required by law oris reasonably necessary to enforce our legal rights or to protect your vitalinterests or those of any third party.We may share your information with third parties inconnection with any proposed purchase, merger, or acquisition of our Servicesor any part of our business. In the event of an actual purchase, merger, oracquisition, we may transfer all information we collect to the relevant third
party and will obtain your consent if required by law.5.
AGE LIMITWe do not knowingly collect personally identifyinginformation from children under 13 years of age.6.

THIRD PARTY SERVICESOur Services may contain links to third-partywebsites and applications of interest, including advertisements and externalservices, that are not affiliated with us. Once you have used these links toleave our Services, any information you provide to these third parties is notcovered by this Privacy Policy, and we cannot guarantee the safety and privacyof your information. Before visiting and providing any information to any

third-party websites, you should inform yourself of the privacy policies and practices(if any) of the third party responsible for that website, and should take thosesteps necessary to, in your discretion, protect the privacy of yourinformation. We are not responsible for the content or privacy and securitypractices and policies of any third parties, including other sites, services orapplications that may be linked to or from our Services.7.
UPDATES TO THIS PRIVACY POLICYWe may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Wewill update the "Last Updated" time at the top of this page when wemake changes.8.
CONTACT USIf you have questions or comments about this PrivacyPolicy, please e-mail us at: support@logicord.com
